title: Event
description: Represents a monitoring event detected by Enterprise Manager. Events are the atomic detections that are correlated into incidents.

targetName.description: Name of the target that generated this event.

targetType.description: Type of the target that generated this event.

metricGroupName.description: Name of the metric group, if this is a metric alert event.

metricColumnName.description: Name of the metric column, if this is a metric alert event.

metricValue.description: Metric value that triggered the event.

timeRaised.description: Timestamp when the event was raised.

timeResolved.description: Timestamp when the event was resolved.

canonicalLink.description: Canonical URI for this event resource.
